response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned the entire video for any vocal music. 2. Determined that the audio is solely comprised of Minecraft game sounds and VTuber voice commentary throughout. 3. Confirmed no songs were performed or playing in the background at any point. 4. Concluded there is no song-related data to resolve.
response.global_summary: The video depicts a group of VTubers engaging in a Minecraft boss battle against 'Hatotaur' and later a second-phase boss called 'Shubangelion'. The audio consists entirely of game sound effects and live voice commentary from the participants. There is no background music or singing.

scenes.description: VTubers are fighting a Minecraft boss 'Hatotaur'. The audio consists only of game sounds and live voice commentary.
The battle enters phase two, with the boss 'Shubangelion' appearing. The audio remains limited to game sound effects and live voice commentary.
